page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Theatrical Edition - Magokoro o, Kimi ni
text:
is an artbook of the Neon Genesis Evangelion Film Books for Neon Genesis Evangelion Theatrical Edition - Magokoro o, Kimi ni film. It was written by Newtype Editorial Department and published by Kadokawa Shoten on 18 November 1997. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4048528823
